body.title: CLOSED: Port igor_mcp.py tool inventory to Librarian
body.result: 16 tools across 4 modules, mcp_server wired, 24 tests (85a5a81)
body.description:
Port all tools from igor_mcp.py and cc_mcp_server.py into the Librarian MCP server. Update comms:// routing to use ADC bus rather than direct IMAP.

Tool inventory to port: db_query, db_dispatch, memory_search, memory_get, memory_list_by_type, channel_read, channel_send, traces_recent, habit_list, tail_heat, hot_attractors, hot_nodes, turn_trace_recent, consult_sessions_recent.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/tools/*.py, agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/mcp_server.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; no direct IMAP; all backend calls go through comms:// bus or direct Postgres (see T-librarian-db-proxy for the DB path decision)
**Scope boundary:** port existing tools only; no new tools in this ticket
**Test plan:** each ported tool has a unit test; integration test calls db_query and gets rows back
